title: School grounds
doc_html:
§2115.5.  School grounds

No law, rule, or policy shall prevent a student attending any public elementary or secondary school from participating in voluntary, student-initiated, student-led prayer on school property before or after school or during free time.

Acts 1995, No. 264, §1.
